scripts.dev: npm run dev:infra && npm run dev:apps
scripts.dev:all: npm run dev:infra && npm run dev:prepare && npm run dev:apps
scripts.dev:apps:with-worker: concurrently "npm run dev --workspace @email-saas/api" "npm run dev --workspace @email-saas/web" "npm run worker:dev --workspace @email-saas/api"
scripts.dev:prepare: npm run setup && npm run prisma:generate --workspace @email-saas/api && npm run prisma:migrate --workspace @email-saas/api && npm run seed
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @email-saas/shared && npm run build --workspace @email-saas/api && npm run build --workspace @email-saas/web
